tweets.text:
🚨 BOVINO’S RED PILL: “HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS” OF NON-ASSIMILATING FOREIGNERS ARE ERASING AMERICA’S CULTURE — AND THE DEEP STATE SILENCED THE ONE MAN WHO DARED SAY IT

Former U.S. Border Patrol Commander Gregory Bovino — 30-year veteran, El Centro Sector Chief, and the iron-fisted Commander-at-Large who led Trump’s most aggressive interior enforcement surges — just dropped the unvarnished truth no politician wants to hear:

     “Our culture is definitely in jeopardy by those 
       hundreds of millions of foreigners that… don’t care 
       about your culture… that to me is a greater threat 
       than a violent criminal or a terrorist.”

He’s right. History doesn’t lie. Nations don’t survive when their foundational mores — the shared language, values, history, and way of life that Tocqueville called the “habits of the heart” — are diluted into irrelevance by mass influxes that reject assimilation. Rome didn’t fall to barbarians at the gates; it fell when the gates were thrown open, and the barbarians inside never became Roman. America was forged by settlers who built a republic on English common law, Judeo-Christian ethics, and e pluribus unum — out of many, ONE. Not a Tower of Babel.

Bovino knows the numbers and the stakes: ~100 million illegals already here, flooding cities, refusing our culture, and turning our heartland into something unrecognizable. Mass deportations slowed because some in the administration got “cold feet” over polls. Targeting only the “worst of the worst”? That’s a green light to the rest: You’re safe. 

The immigrant caravans are already starting again.

His solution is pure strategic genius — attrition through enforcement: surges of DHS agents into every major sanctuary city. Make it so hard for them to live, work, procreate, or thrive here that they have NO CHOICE but to self-deport. No more half-measures. No more signaling weakness.

The deep state (globalist, open borders crowd) and weak-kneed insiders removed him because he was too effective. Too visible. Too unwilling to play the game. @USBPChiefELC @GregoryKBovino is a patriot who put boots on the ground, not just talking points in D.C. He defended the Republic when it mattered most.

We do NOT have a country until every single illegal alien is gone. Full stop.

America’s survival isn’t optional. It’s existential.

Who’s with Bovino? Drop your thoughts below. The time for polite debate is long over.

h/t @JackPosobiec 

#BovinoWasRight #MassDeportationNow #SaveOurCulture #AttritionThroughEnforcement #Deport100Million #HonorFirst #AmericaFirstOrBust #NoCountryLeftBehind #CulturalSurvival
